userPrompt.userInput: Hello, please introduce yourself and list your capabilities.

responseFormat.note: A mixture of required response Formats is allowed.  Combine the responses in a sensible and comprehensible way.

required.name: assistantFeedback
required.purpose: Focus on facts, logical order, clarity, and conciseness.

required.name: expositoryText
required.purpose: Focus on facts, logical order, clarity, and conciseness.

required.name: descriptiveText
required.purpose: Create a picture through imagery to help the reader visualize scenes, emotions, or experiences.

required.name: tabular
required.purpose: Row ordering reflects data content, e.g., temporal, magnitude, similarity.  Columns reflect main data properties. UserPrompt provides further guidance.

required.name: spreadsheet
required.format: A spreadsheet in .csv format unless indicated otherwise in the user prompt.
required.purpose: Row ordering reflects data content, e.g., temporal, magnitude, similarity.  Columns reflect main data properties. UserPrompt provides further guidance.

required.name: ffMpegSubclipping
required.purpose: Times in hh:mm:ss format of in and out-points of subclips

required.name: curatorSubclipping
required.purpose: Timecodes in SMPTE hh:mm:ss:ff format of in-and out-points of subclips

required.name: soccerSpatioTemporal
required.purpose: Progress of ball towards opposition goal measured in average speed/number of passes. UserPrompt provides further guidance.

required.name: soccerSpatioTemporal
required.purpose: Sequences of play extracted and transformed into graph data for loading into Neo4j,
